title: Add attempts/ directory with experiment templates
author: dhruvjatkar

data.description: Adds an attempts/ directory structure for tracking in-progress experiments, including a template subfolder, results comparison table, and documentation for workflow and status conventions.

novel_contributions: Introduced an attempts/ directory structure for organizing in-progress experiments
Added a _template/ folder with submission.json, README.md, and env.sh templates
Added attempts/README.md documenting folder structure, naming conventions, workflow, and status values
